meta.description: NOCHILL Viral Script Generator - Complete Framework Knowledge Base
meta.philosophy: Ubuntu + Kingdom + Legacy - Building for children's children

R.name: Relevant
R.question: Who is this for?
R.description: ICP targeting - speak directly to ideal customer profile

A.name: Awareness
A.question: What do they know?
A.description: Match content to audience knowledge level

C.name: Clarity of Outcome
C.question: What outcome promised?
C.description: The 4 hook types based on psychological clarity

information_gap.name: Information Gap
information_gap.pattern: You see X? Here's what they're NOT telling you about Y...
information_gap.when_to_use: Audience knows result exists but not hidden factors
information_gap.example: You know when creators say 'comment LINK for free download'? Here's the automation they're hiding...
information_gap.power_move: Creates curiosity through knowledge gap revelation

variation_types.A: Power word focused - emphasize unique power words
variation_types.B: Curiosity gap - create knowledge gap that demands filling

desired_result.name: Desired Result
desired_result.pattern: I'm going to show you how to achieve X in Y time—even if Z...
desired_result.when_to_use: Audience wants clear solution, needs confidence
desired_result.example: I'm going to save you 30 hours creating content in 2 hours—even during loadshedding.

variation_types.A: Power word focused - emphasize transformation language
variation_types.B: Curiosity gap - create intrigue around method

undesired_result.name: Undesired Result
undesired_result.pattern: Never, ever, ever do X. Once you do, Y. And next thing: Z.
undesired_result.description: Calls out mistake and reveals consequences
undesired_result.example: Never send a client a payment link. Once you do, they start thinking. And next: 'I need to think about it.'

variation_types.A: Power word focused - emphasize danger language
variation_types.B: Curiosity gap - tease the mistake without revealing
variation_types.C: Urgency/FOMO - stop before it's too late

a_to_b_transformation.name: A-to-B Transformation
a_to_b_transformation.pattern: You're doing X. Here's how to do Y instead—and achieve Z.
a_to_b_transformation.description: Shows pathway from wrong state to right state
a_to_b_transformation.when_to_use: Audience stuck in wrong state, needs pathway
a_to_b_transformation.example: Hashtags are dead. Stop focusing on them. Instead, here are 3 hacks to make you famous.

variation_types.B: Curiosity gap - reveal better way exists
variation_types.C: Urgency/FOMO - change now before falling behind

U.name: Unique
U.question: What breaks the pattern?
U.description: Power words, unique angles, pattern interrupts

B.name: Broadened
B.question: How to reach more?
B.description: Remove specifics to expand audience while maintaining relevance

negativity.how: Attack problem, never person. Use indirect negativity.

you_format.how: Replace: they → you, people → you, someone → you

short_simple.how: One idea per hook. No jargon.

audible_flow.how: Read out loud. If you stumble, rewrite.
audible_flow.why: Most content consumed with audio on

use_when: They know the outcome but not the method
You have insider knowledge to reveal
They want transformation but lack confidence
